title: ilex altiplana
intro: Ilex altiplana, also known as the Andean holly tree, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Ilex genus. It is native to the Andean highlands and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Ilex altiplana include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed for their medicinal properties.
